discover.title: Barrie's waterfront in 90 seconds
discover.description: Kempenfelt Bay, the marina, and Centennial Park — all a 12-min walk from Barrie South GO.

discover.title: 5 things to do in downtown Barrie this weekend
discover.description: Farmer's market, the MacLaren Art Centre, and the best patio on Dunlop Street.

discover.title: Hidden gems: Barrie's Allandale neighbourhood
discover.description: A quiet historic district most visitors skip — 3 min walk from the GO station.

eat.name: The Cellar Pub & Grill
eat.highlight: Butter chicken poutine. Open since 1994. Local institution.

eat.name: Tara's Shoreline
eat.highlight: Lake Simcoe whitefish, bay views, great for a slow dinner.

eat.name: Hurley's Bakery & Cafe
eat.highlight: Grab a butter tart for the ride home. Barrie's best bakery since 1987.

shop.name: Simcoe County Craft Co.
shop.highlight: Handmade ceramics, prints, and candles from 40 Barrie-area artists.

shop.name: Kempenfelt Bay Roasters
shop.highlight: Small-batch roasts from Barrie's favourite independent café. Ships Canada-wide.

shop.name: Georgian Bay Outfitters
shop.highlight: Barrie-branded hoodies, water bottles, and canoe gear. Takes you back to the bay.
